title: Every Song Is About Me
original_title: Todas las canciones hablan de mí
overview: Film that revolves around the theme of love, but this time under the premise of a boy who tries to forget a girl, a story far more difficult to bear, especially when the girl you just separated from comes back again in each of the memories of your past and you feel that "all the love songs talk about me"
